description: Allows the player to walk while their inventory or a GUI container is open. Handles movement key presses directly.

fields.ticks: int - counts total ticks since module start, reset to 0 when a C0EPacketClickWindow is sent
fields.stopMoving: boolean - true for the first 10 ticks after a click window packet (or until ticks>=10), used by Hypixel mode to stop movement briefly after interactions

settings.name: Mode
settings.description: Standard = full movement in inventory. Hypixel = stops movement briefly after each click window action to avoid flagging.

settings.name: ClickGUI
settings.description: If enabled, also allows movement when the client's ClickGUI screen is open

onPreUpdate.description: Polls keyboard state for movement keys and applies them directly via KeyBinding.setKeyBindState() every tick.
onPreUpdate.condition: mc.currentScreen instanceof GuiContainer OR GuiInventory OR (ClickGUI enabled && mc.currentScreen instanceof ClickGUI)
onPreUpdate.method: For each key, reads the real keyboard state via Keyboard.isKeyDown() and forces the KeyBinding's pressed state to match.
onPreUpdate.tick_tracking: ticks++ each call. stopMoving = (ticks < 10 || not in GuiInventory).

onPreInput.description: Suppresses sprinting entirely while in a GUI. If Hypixel mode and stopMoving is true, zeroes movement input.
actions: If Hypixel mode and stopMoving: moveForward = 0, moveStrafe = 0

onEvent(PacketSendEvent).description: Watches for C0EPacketClickWindow packets to reset the tick counter and flag stopMoving (Hypixel mode only).
actions: If Hypixel mode: stopMoving = true (stops movement for next 10 ticks)

implementation_notes: The core mechanic overrides the fact that Minecraft normally consumes movement key inputs when a GUI screen is open. By directly calling KeyBinding.setKeyBindState() with the raw keyboard state each tick, movement is restored.
Sprint is explicitly disabled (setSprinting(false)) because sprint mechanics don't work properly from inventory and could cause desync.

Hypixel mode adds a post-click movement freeze: after any C0EPacketClickWindow packet, movement is suppressed for 10 ticks via the stopMoving flag. This helps avoid anti-cheat flags on Hypixel where moving immediately after inventory actions is checked.
The display name shows the current mode as a suffix (e.g., 'InvMove §7 Hypixel').
Only GuiContainer/GuiInventory screens are supported for movement (plus ClickGUI optionally). Other screens like chat, death screen, etc. are not affected.
